cloudtelemetryd(8) System Manager's Manual cloudtelemetryd(8)

NAME

cloudtelemetryd — Cloud Telemetry Daemon

SYNOPSIS

cloudtelemetryd

DESCRIPTION

cloudtelemetryd is a launch daemon for executing handling system-wide telemetry events.

There are no configuration options to cloudtelemetryd. Users should not run cloudtelemetryd manually.

2/20/2023 macOS
